events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario involves a panelboard installation at rough-complete stage with a missing knockout filler. This is a code violation - NEC 408 requires unused openings in panelboards to be closed/filled. Missing knockout filler means an open unused knockout, which is a defect.

Decision: fail (non-compliant)
Risk: medium (exposed energized parts potential)
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: ~85
Confidence: high

Findings: missing knockout filler leaving unused opening in panelboard
Actions: install listed knockout closure/plug
References: NEC Art. 408, 110.26
